message:
fix(http): use RAII guard for connection pool cleanup on request failure

Replace the manual drop_connection call in the error path of
execute_single with a ConnectionGuard that automatically returns the
connection to the pool's drop path when the scope exits. The guard is
defused on the success path before release_connection is called.

This ensures connections are properly cleaned up even if a panic or
early return occurs between acquire and the match arms, preventing
pool entry leaks under unexpected control flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
